expectations.text: Output JSON contains entity_type = 'Company' and entity_subtype = 'Pty Ltd'
expectations.evidence: owner_classification.json has "entity_type": "Company" and "entity_subtype": "Pty Ltd" at the top level.

expectations.text: CoR14.3 registration certificate is classified under CIPC bucket
expectations.evidence: cipc.documents contains an entry with "type": "CoR14.3" and "filename": "registration_certificate.txt" with status "found".

expectations.text: Both SA ID documents (Pieter and Annelie) are classified under FICA bucket
expectations.evidence: fica.documents contains two entries with "type": "SA ID" — pieter_id.txt (Pieter Johannes Van der Berg) and annelie_id.txt (Annelie Van der Berg), both with status "found".

expectations.text: Bank Confirmation Letter is classified under FICA bucket
expectations.evidence: fica.documents contains an entry with "type": "Bank Confirmation Letter" and "filename": "bank_confirmation.txt" with status "found".

expectations.text: Directors list in extracted_data contains both VAN DER BERG directors
expectations.evidence: extracted_data.directors contains both "Pieter Johannes Van der Berg" (ID 7503065023082) and "Annelie Van der Berg" (ID 7811190045087).
extracted_data.registration_number is "2019/087432/07". Also appears in cipc.documents[0].extracted.registration_number and cipc.documents[1].extracted.registration_number.

expectations.text: FICA status is 'complete' — all required docs present
expectations.evidence: fica.status is "complete" and fica.missing is an empty array []. Advisory flags are present but do not change the complete status.

expectations.text: CIPC status is 'complete' — CoR14.3, CoR39, and MOI all found
expectations.evidence: cipc.status is "needs_review", not "complete". CoR14.3, CoR39 (directors_notice.txt), and CoR15.1A (MOI) are all found, but the classifier flagged a missing CoR123 Annual Return and set the status to needs_review rather than complete.

expectations.text: No red flags raised (all docs valid and current)
expectations.evidence: Two advisory flags in fica.flags (missing VAT registration, no shareholder register CoR14.1) and one flag in cipc.flags (no CoR123 Annual Return). cipc.missing also lists "CoR123 (Annual Return)".

expectations.text: owner_classification.json is written to the output folder
expectations.evidence: The file exists at .claude/skills/za-company-doc-classifier-workspace/iteration-1/eval-pty-ltd-complete/with_skill/outputs/owner_classification.json and was successfully read. summary.md also confirms it was written to that path.
